ground_truth.title: Attention Is All You Need
ground_truth.abstract: We propose a new simple network architecture, the Transformer, based solely on attention mechanisms, dispensing with recurrence and convolutions entirely.
key_findings: The Transformer model outperforms recurrent or convolutional models in translation quality.
Training requires significantly less time than traditional architectures.
figure_captions: Figure 1: Attention visualization showing multi-head attention patterns across encoder layers.
Figure 2: Model architecture of the Transformer.
Figure 3: Training curves comparing the Transformer against baseline models.

ground_truth.title: BERT: Pre-training of Deep Bidirectional Transformers for Language Understanding
ground_truth.abstract: We introduce a new language representation model called BERT, which stands for Bidirectional Encoder Representations from Transformers.
key_findings: BERT achieves state-of-the-art performance on 11 NLP tasks.
Pre-training deep bidirectional representations improves task performance.
figure_captions: Figure 1: Overall pre-training and fine-tuning procedures for BERT.
Figure 2: Ablation study results showing the contribution of each pre-training task.
Figure 3: Comparison of BERT model sizes.
figure_only_facts: Removing the Next Sentence Prediction task reduces performance by 0.7 F1 on SQuAD v2.0
